comments.t: Teri aur teri saheli dono ki chut ek saath faad dunga, tayyar rehna aaj raat.
Main tujhe aur teri friend ko ek hi bed pe chodunga jab tak dono thak na jayein.
Dono randiyon ki gaand mar ke bhosda bana dunga, video me jo dikha rahi ho wahi haqikat banegi.
Teri chut me apna lund daalunga aur teri friend ki chut me ungli karte rahunga.
Ek saath dono ko cuda ke thak jaunga, koi bach nahi payegi is baar.
Tujhe doggy style me chodunga aur teri friend ka muh me lund de dunga saath me.
Dono ki chut chat chat ke tumhara saara maal pi jaunga, randi jaisi taste aa rahi hai.
Teri saheli ko bhi meri randi bana lunga, dono ek hi room me nangi rahogi.
Tujhpe gangbang karunga, chaar lund ek saath teri chut aur gaand me jayenge.
Teri friend ki gaand tujhe chuswaunga pehle, phir main dono ko pelunga.
Dono ko kutiya bana ke peeche se chodunga jab tak cheekh band na ho.
Teri chut faad ke teri friend ki chut me thook dunga, ye mera plan hai aaj.
Ek lund teri chut me aur ek lund teri friend ke muh me ek saath daal dunga.
Tujhe aur teri behen ko ek saath pel dunga agar dono ek ghar me mili.
Dono randi jaisi lag rahi ho, bilkul chodne layak maal ho tum video me.
Teri ex ki chut bhi yaad aa rahi hai, usko bhi chodne ka man kar raha hai.
Apni ex ko bula le saath me, main dono ko ek hi bed pe pel dunga.
Teri purani yaar ki gaand bhi marunga jab wo saamne aayegi, bhool mat jana.
Tera ex ka lund chuswa ke tujhe dikhaunga ki tu meri randi hai ab.
Tujhe apne ex ke saamne chod ke randi bana dunga, sharam sab khatam kar dunga.
Teri chut me itna bada lund daalunga ki teri cheekh poore mohalle me sunai degi.
Gadhe jaisa mota lund teri chut me ghusa dunga, dekh lena tu bardasht kar payegi ya nahi.
Tera poora bhosda bana dunga itne bade lund se ki dubara tight na lage.
Aaj teri chut faad ke khoon nikal dunga, itna hard chodunga ki yaad rahega.
Teri chut itni tight lag rahi hai jaise teri maa ki umar ki randi ho tu.
Agar mujhe mauka mila to poora parivar chod dunga, koi bachi nahi rahegi.
Teri behen ki chut bhi chodni hai mujhe, jaldi le aana use bhi saath me.
Saas aur bahu dono ko ek saath lunga jab ghar me akeli hongi.
Teri chut me muth maar ke video banaunga aur sabko bhej dunga agar nakhre kiye.
Randi tu hai poori, teri chut ab public property hai meri nazron me.
Har angle se apni chut dikha randi, main har pose me tujhe pelunga.
Teri chut pe jhad ke photo bhejunga tujhe, save kar lena gallery me.
Teri chut chat ke tera saara pani pi jaunga, ek boond bhi waste nahi hone dunga.
Teri gaand me lund aur chut me ungli ek saath daal dunga, dono ched bhar dunga.
Teri tight gaand fad ke rakh dunga aaj, kal se chalna mushkil hoga tujhe.
Do lund ek saath teri chut me daalne ka man kar raha hai, dost ko bula lunga.
Aaj raat tujhe pregnant kar dunga, pill mat lena kuch bhi baad me.
Teri chut ka bhosda bana ke chhod dunga, phir dubara mat bolna tight hai.
Kitni badi randi hai tu, ye video dekh ke sabko pata chal gaya ab.
Tera ex dekh raha hoga, ab tu meri randi ban ke rehgi har roz.
Mera lund chuswaunga tujhse apne ex ke saamne, sharam haya sab khatam.
Teri friend ko bhi tera lund chuswaunga, dono ek dusre ko sikhayengi.
Dono ko nanga karke ek dusre ki chut chatwaunga, phir main aa ke pelunga.
Tujhe aur teri saheli ko threesome me le lunga, teen ghante tak nahi rukunga.
Pehle teri friend ki gaand marunga, phir teri chut me apna maal bhar dunga.
Dono ki chut me apna maal bhar dunga itna ki bahar tak beh jaye.
Teri chut itni gili lag rahi hai jaise randi ne paani chhod diya ho abhi.
Tera pati dekh le kaise teri chut chat raha hu main, wo kuch nahi kar payega.
Bhabhi, teri chut me apna bada lund daal du kya, devar hun main tera.
Main tera devar hun, teri chut faad ke rakh dunga jab bhi akeli milegi.
Tu saas ki umr ki lagti hai par chut jawan randi jaisi hai, mast maal hai.
Teri chut me jeeb ghusa ke andar tak chatunga jab tak tu jhad na jaye.

Teri randi chut pe double penetration karunga, do lund ek saath andar.

Teri chut ki video leak kar dunga agar mujhse baat karne ka style badla.
Blackmail karke har roz chodunga tujhe, escape nahi hai ab teri.
Agar nahi mani to teri chut me bottle ghusa dunga, soch le pehle se.
